home.heroSubline: Seputeh HYO empowers youth to lead, serve, and grow in the heart of Kuala Lumpur.

about.title: About Us
about.mission: To develop youth leadership, cultural awareness, and community service among the youth of Seputeh.
about.vision: A generation of empowered youth who contribute meaningfully to Malaysian society.

contact.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

contact.sendError: Sorry, we couldn't send your message. Please try again or email us directly.

membership.title: Be Part of Us
membership.pdpaLabel: I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy and consent to my data being processed for membership purposes.
membership.successMessage: Thank you for applying. We'll be in touch soon.
membership.sendError: Sorry, we couldn't submit your application. Please try again.
membership.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
membership.errorInterestsMin: Please select at least one interest.
membership.errorPdpaRequired: You must agree to the Privacy Policy before submitting.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Body: When you submit our membership application form, we collect: your full name, date of birth, gender, mobile number, email address, area/location, and programme interests.
privacy.section2Body: We collect this information to process your membership application and to communicate with you about Seputeh HYO programmes and activities.
privacy.section3Body: Submitted data is received via email only. Seputeh HYO does not operate a database for membership data. Your information is held in the organisation's official email inbox.
privacy.section4Body: Under the Personal Data Protection Act 2010 (Malaysia), you have the right to: access your personal data, correct inaccurate data, withdraw consent and cease processing, and inquire about how your data is processed.
privacy.section5Body: To exercise your rights or make a data-related enquiry, please email us at the address listed on our Contact Us page.
